docs.title: Developer Documentation | Salesforce Developers
docs.text:
Developer Documentation | Salesforce Developers
Browse docs
Start Learning
Browse
Get Support
Cookie Consent Manager
General Information
Required Cookies
Functional Cookies
Advertising Cookies
General Information
We use three kinds of cookies on our websites: required, functional, and advertising. You can choose whether functional and advertising cookies apply. Click on the different cookie categories to find out more about each category and to change the default settings.
Privacy Statement
Required Cookies
Always Active
Required cookies are necessary for basic website functionality. Some examples include: session cookies needed to transmit the website, authentication cookies, and security cookies.
Cookies Details‎
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
Functional cookies enhance functions, performance, and services on the website. Some examples include: cookies used to analyze site traffic, cookies used for market research, and cookies used to display advertising that is not directed to a particular individual.
Cookies Details‎
Advertising Cookies
Advertising Cookies
Advertising cookies track activity across websites in order to understand a viewer’s interests, and direct them specific marketing. Some examples include: cookies used for remarketing, or interest-based advertising.
Cookies Details‎
Back Button
Cookie List
Filter Button
Consent

analysis.name: Salesforce
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered CRM platform unifying sales, service, marketing, and commerce with autonomous agents across the customer lifecycle
analysis.ideal_customer: Large enterprises and mid-market companies needing a unified customer data and engagement platform across sales, service, and marketing teams

differentiators: Agentforce: purpose-built autonomous AI agent platform natively integrated with CRM data
AppExchange / AgentExchange: largest enterprise app marketplace with agent-ready integrations
Unified platform spanning CRM, analytics (Tableau), integration (MuleSoft), messaging (Slack), and PaaS (Heroku)
MCP support enabling open agent interoperability standards
Multi-LLM support including Claude Opus 4.6 and OpenAI within a single governance layer
Data 360 cross-cloud analytics with currency reporting and dimensional hierarchies

praised: Extremely powerful and customizable platform for large enterprises
Massive ecosystem of integrations and partners via AppExchange/AgentExchange
Strong reporting and analytics capabilities (Tableau acquisition)
Industry-standard CRM with deep sales pipeline management
complaints: Complex and expensive — frequently cited as bloated for SMBs
Steep learning curve; requires significant admin/developer resources
Pricing opacity — enterprise tiers often require contact sales
Performance and UI speed complaints on older Lightning pages
Security culture questions raised after firing red team staffers who gave Defcon talk

tiers.name: Starter Suite
tiers.headline_inclusions: Basic CRM for small teams: accounts, contacts, leads, opportunities, email integration

tiers.name: Pro Suite
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full CRM + automation, pipeline management, customizable reports, quoting

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Advanced CRM with workflow automation, APIs, custom app building, advanced reporting

tiers.name: Unlimited
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Enterprise features + unlimited customizations, premier support, sandbox environments

tiers.name: Einstein 1 Sales
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited + Agentforce AI, Data Cloud, Slack, Tableau — full platform bundle

pricing.notes: Pricing scraped from source was blocked (Access Denied). Tier prices above reflect widely published Sales Cloud pricing as of mid-2025; verify against current pricing page. All tiers billed annually. Agentforce consumption priced separately per conversation. MuleSoft, Marketing Cloud, Service Cloud, and Commerce Cloud each have separate pricing tracks. Significant discounts available through multi-year and volume agreements.
